visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Anagram Signature
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The current `get_signature` function manually builds the frequency string using a loop. Refactor it to use a more concise approach like sorting the lowercase string directly for simpler anagram identification.

solution.explanation: Simply sorting the characters of the lowercase word is an efficient and clean way to generate a canonical signature for anagram detection. All anagrams will have the same sorted character sequence, making comparison straightforward.
